title: Particl in San Francisco — Bitcoin2019

primary_tag.name: News & Updates
primary_tag.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

tags.name: News & Updates
tags.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

plaintext:
Fresh from Particl’s trip to New York for the NYC Blockchain Week, the team is
ready to travel the world once again and attend the Bitcoin2019 conference in
San Francisco on the 25th and 26th of June 2019.

This time, the conference will be attended by Lina Seiche, Joe Fisher, and
Cryptoguard. Make sure to let them know if you’re also attending and would like
to meet them!


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Bitcoin 2019 | June 25-26 | San Francisco
[https://www.bitcoin2019conference.com/]
Join us at SVN West in San Francisco on June 25-26th for Bitcoin 2019: A
Peer-to-Peer Conference. Tickets are only $249…
[https://www.bitcoin2019conference.com/]www.bitcoin2019conference.com
[https://www.bitcoin2019conference.com/]

> After 10 years of evolution, hacks, scams, civil war and breakthroughs, it’s
time to think about where Bitcoin will go in the next decade. This will be the
return of Bitcoin’s annual conference, an event to push innovation forward,
collaborate with old and new friends and reignite the community of
permissionless value. —Bitcoin2019 [https://www.bitcoin2019conference.com/]
This Bitcoin-focused conference has an impressive lineup of keynote speakers
including Edward Snowden, Tim Draper, Andrew Poelstra, Anthony Pompliano, Erik
Voorhees, Francis Pouliot, Jimmy Song, Max Keiser, Peter McCormack, Tone Vays,
Tuur Demeester, and many more. Click here
[https://www.bitcoin2019conference.com/speakers] for a complete list of keynote
speakers, and here [https://www.bitcoin2019conference.com/program] for the
conference’s day-to-day program.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This conference will be a great opportunity to not only meet with new people and
present them the Open Marketplace, but it’ll also be a great moment to reconvene
with a lot of the great people we’ve met at Magical Crypto Conference and
Consensus, just about a month ago.

If you’re around San Francisco or would like to attend the conference, you can
visit this link [https://www.bitcoin2019conference.com/registration] to buy your
tickets. This conference is definitely going to give you a huge bang for your
bucks as the price of the tickets is quite affordable.

If you already have your ticket, then make sure to drop a message to any of the
Particl team members that are going to attend this event (Lina Seiche, Joe
Fisher, and Cryptoguard), either on Discord, Telegram, or Riot.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
html:
Fresh from Particl’s trip to New York for the NYC Blockchain Week, the team is ready to travel the world once again and attend the Bitcoin2019 conference in San Francisco on the 25th and 26th of June 2019.

This time, the conference will be attended by Lina Seiche, Joe Fisher, and Cryptoguard. Make sure to let them know if you’re also attending and would like to meet them!

Bitcoin 2019 | June 25-26 | San Francisco
Join us at SVN West in San Francisco on June 25-26th for Bitcoin 2019: A Peer-to-Peer Conference. Tickets are only $249…www.bitcoin2019conference.com

After 10 years of evolution, hacks, scams, civil war and breakthroughs, it’s time to think about where Bitcoin will go in the next decade. This will be the return of Bitcoin’s annual conference, an event to push innovation forward, collaborate with old and new friends and reignite the community of permissionless value. — Bitcoin2019

This Bitcoin-focused conference has an impressive lineup of keynote speakers including Edward Snowden, Tim Draper, Andrew Poelstra, Anthony Pompliano, Erik Voorhees, Francis Pouliot, Jimmy Song, Max Keiser, Peter McCormack, Tone Vays, Tuur Demeester, and many more. Click here for a complete list of keynote speakers, and here for the conference’s day-to-day program.

This conference will be a great opportunity to not only meet with new people and present them the Open Marketplace, but it’ll also be a great moment to reconvene with a lot of the great people we’ve met at Magical Crypto Conference and Consensus, just about a month ago.

If you’re around San Francisco or would like to attend the conference, you can visit this link to buy your tickets. This conference is definitely going to give you a huge bang for your bucks as the price of the tickets is quite affordable.

If you already have your ticket, then make sure to drop a message to any of the Particl team members that are going to attend this event (Lina Seiche, Joe Fisher, and Cryptoguard), either on Discord, Telegram, or Riot.
